Vendored source from `TYKUHN2/AtomicFramework` has been integrated into this project
to build the minimal lifecycle/networking support directly into `NuclearVOIP.dll`.

Source repository: https://github.com/TYKUHN2/AtomicFramework
License: Apache License 2.0

The vendored source in `AtomicFramework/` is intentionally limited to the subset needed
by NuclearVOIP and includes local compatibility adjustments.
